description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a multi-material upper with a mix of mesh, synthetic overlays, and textile elements. The shoe displays a dynamic color palette, including olive green, beige, orange, and dark gray, with a distinctive woven pattern on the toe box and side panels. The midsole is thick and textured, providing ample cushioning and a visually striking, geometric design. The lacing system is reinforced with wide synthetic straps that integrate into the side panels for added support. The heel area is padded and features a ribbed orange accent, while the tongue is branded and well-cushioned. Overall, the shoe is designed for both comfort and urban style, suitable for everyday wear in city environments.
description: A stylish, multi-colored athletic sneaker with a thick, textured sole, woven mesh upper, and reinforced lacing system, designed for comfort and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered mesh and synthetic upper, thick textured sole, and prominent lacing straps.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the woven toe box, central lacing, and branded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the same layered construction and color pattern, with visible heel padding.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded heel collar, ribbed orange accent, and the heel portion of the sole.
attribute_logo: Red Adidas trefoil logo on the tongue
